name: waggle-memory
display_name: Waggle: Local Memory for AI Agents
description: Local graph memory for coding agents using MCP. Persistent repo decisions, constraints, corrections, contradictions, and session context across chats.
long_description: Waggle gives coding agents persistent repo memory without requiring a cloud account or API key. It stores decisions, reasons, constraints, corrections, contradictions, and transcript-backed context locally, then exposes that memory through MCP tools for priming, retrieval, observation, export, and inspection workflows.

db_path.title: Database Path
db_path.description: Local SQLite database path for Waggle memory.

tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: Default memory namespace for this Claude Desktop installation.

model.title: Embedding Model
model.description: Embedding model identifier for local retrieval.

export_dir.title: Export Directory
export_dir.description: Optional local directory for exports and backups.

startup_mode.title: Startup Mode
startup_mode.description: Optional startup mode for local launch behavior: fast, normal, or strict.
